6670.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
6670.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

6671.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
6671.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

6672.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
6672.description: We've gone back to the 80s here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

6673.title: Forever 80s
6673.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

6674.title: 40 Greatest Voices Of The 80s!
6674.description: The 80s provided us some of the greatest voices in music - and we're playing 40 of them right now!

6675.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1986!
6675.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1986!

6676.title: ... So 80s!
6676.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
